SumOfProgramRelatedInvstGrp.Description1Txt: PURPOSE WORKFORCE SOLUTIONS, L3C INVESTMENT TO FURTHER THE ACCOMPLISHMENT OF THE FOUNDATION'S CHARITABLE PURPOSES.

RlnOfActyToAccomOfExmptPrpsGrp.RelationshipStatementTxt: THE FOUNDATION RECEIVED TAX-EXEMPT INCOME OF $37,297 FROM Pritzker Family Foundations, L.L.C., Stonehill Institutional Partners, LP., AND Energy Capital Partners III-A, LP. The Foundation had a $250,000 non-taxable basis adjustment.
THE FOUNDATION RECEIVED $6,024 IN STATE TAX REFUNDS and $306,282 in Federal Tax Refunds.
